title: Document Preview

posts.author: BenWalker (Ben)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

A general confusion comes about when a document has multiple pages and staff cant scroll down to the second page in the preview window and often miss the next page button at the bottom of the screen.
the ability to just continue to scroll down to the next page is simple, logical and removes the need for a next page button.

What are you trying to achieve

a streamlining of the document preview by removing the next page button and replacing with a continued scroll down.

posts.author: BenWalker (Ben)
posts.cookedHtml: Please ignore, turns out there is a button next to “next page” for this exact feature
